name: Lincolnshire (United Kingdom)
description: A field quartered in green and blue by a yellow cross bordered red, with the colours alternating.
history: Designed by schoolgirl Andrea Bowes-Catton (then 13) and selected by public vote in a 2005 BBC Radio Lincolnshire / Lincolnshire Echo competition; registered with the Flag Institute on 24 October 2005. Green represents agricultural land, blue the sea and the historic kingdom of Lindsey.

features.symbolism: the cross fimbriated red separating the four quarters
